name: ICICI Prudential BHARAT 22 FOF

key_facts.Current NAV: The Current Net Asset Value of the ICICI Prudential BHARAT 22 FOF - Direct Plan as of Jul 21, 2026 is Rs 33.99 for Growth option of its Direct plan.
key_facts.Fund Size: The ICICI Prudential BHARAT 22 FOF - Direct Plan currently holds Assets under Management worth of Rs 2882.81 crore as on Jun 30, 2026.
key_facts.Expense ratio: The expense ratio of the fund is 0.12% for Direct plan as on Jul 16, 2026.
key_facts.Exit Load: The given fund doesn't attract any Exit Load.
key_facts.Minimum Investment: Minimum investment required is Rs 5000 and minimum additional investment is Rs 1000. Minimum SIP investment is Rs 1000.

performance.Trailing/Category Returns: Its trailing returns over different time periods are: 5.39% (1yr), 19.32% (3yr), 23.03% (5yr) and 16.36% (since launch). Whereas, Category returns for the same time duration are: 2.28% (1yr), 14.99% (3yr) and 13.82% (5yr).

objective: Investment Objective - The scheme seeks to generate returns by investing in units of BHARAT 22 ETF.
